description:
With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2022 BMW X7 xDrive 40i, 3.0L TC I6, 4WD, 375 bhp, 7 Speed Automatic. AED 219,000 or AED 3,431 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 74,139 KMs - BMW Warranty Valid Until 24th August 2026 or 200,000 KMs - BMW Service Contract Valid Until 24th August 2026 or 100,000 KMs - Full Service History - GCC specification (AGMC) - Price includes VAT 
 - Recuperation System - Remote Engine Start - 22" BMW Individual Alloy Wheels - M Sport Exhaust System - M Sport Brake - Sport Automatic Transmission - Comfort Access System - Soft Close Automatic System for Doors - M Sport Package - M Sport Package Pro - BMW Grille Iconic Glow - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - Active Seat Ventilation, Front - Comfort Seats, Electric. Adjustable - Glass Application Crafted Clarity - Travel & Comfort System - M Seat Belts - Rear Seat Entertainment - Instrument Finished in Leather - Automatic Air Conditioning 5-zone Control - Ambient Light - Driving Assistant Professional - Parking Assistant Professional - Harman/Kardon Surround Sound System - Apple CarPlay - Wireless Charging Tray - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - BMW Gesture Control - M Leather Steering Wheel - Roof-lining in Alcantara - M Aerodynamics Package - Comfort Package
